name: Zucchini Swedish Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Whirl onion, mushrooms, eggs, and salt in a blender until smooth.
2. Mix the blended mixture with ground beef and grated zucchini.
3. Form the mixture into small meatballs.
4. Bake the meatballs on a large shallow baking sheet for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Carefully pour off any grease that forms, saving the gravy-type liquid in the pan.
6. Pour the remaining sauce into a crockpot or warming dish and add the cream of mushroom soup.
7. Keep warm until serving.
8. Serve as an appetizer or alongside regular Swedish meatballs.
